# MCP Unity (Fork) — llms.txt

> LLM-oriented project summary for mcp-unity (MaansenV fork).

## What is this?

MCP Unity exposes Unity Editor capabilities to MCP-enabled AI clients (Claude, Cursor, OpenCode, etc.) via Model Context Protocol. A Node.js stdio server bridges MCP requests to a WebSocket server running inside the Unity Editor.

```
MCP Client ← stdio → Node.js Server ← WebSocket (8090) → Unity Editor
```

## Architecture

- **C# Editor package** (`Packages/mcp-unity/Editor/`): WebSocket server, tool handlers, resources, MainThreadDispatcher
- **TypeScript MCP server** (`Packages/mcp-unity/Server~/`): Registers MCP tools/resources/prompts, forwards to Unity over WebSocket
- **Bridge contract**: Tool/resource names must match exactly between Node (`toolName`) and Unity (`Name`), typically `lower_snake_case`

## Fork improvements over CoderGamester/mcp-unity

- MainThreadDispatcher (fixes no-focus timeouts — `EditorApplication.update` instead of `delayCall`)
- Auto-repaint after all mutations (SceneView.RepaintAll)
- Multi-object selection + frame-on-select in select_gameobject
- Object reference resolution in update_component (ScriptableObject, Component, GameObject via asset/scene paths)
- ToolErrors helper for structured error messages
- 77 tools, 7 resources, 1 prompt
- Profiler tools: start, stop, get_status, get_memory_stats, capture_frame, status, enable_recording, get_selected_frame

## Key files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Packages/mcp-unity/Server~/src/index.ts` | MCP tool/resource/prompt registration |
| `Packages/mcp-unity/Server~/src/tools/*.ts` | Node-side tool definitions (zod schemas) |
| `Packages/mcp-unity/Editor/UnityBridge/McpUnityServer.cs` | Unity-side tool registration |
| `Packages/mcp-unity/Editor/Tools/*.cs` | Unity-side tool handlers |
| `Packages/mcp-unity/Editor/UnityBridge/McpUnitySocketHandler.cs` | WebSocket message routing |
| `Packages/mcp-unity/Editor/Utils/MainThreadDispatcher.cs` | Thread-safe dispatcher |
| `Packages/mcp-unity/Editor/Utils/ToolErrors.cs` | Structured error messages |

## Adding a tool

1. C# tool in `Editor/Tools/<Name>Tool.cs` (inherit `McpToolBase`)
2. Register in `McpUnityServer.cs` → `RegisterTools()` via `AddTool(new <Name>Tool())`
3. TS tool in `Server~/src/tools/<name>Tool.ts` (zod schema + handler)
4. Register in `Server~/src/index.ts`
5. Build: `cd Server~ && npm run build`

## Configuration

- WebSocket: `ws://localhost:8090/McpUnity`
- Settings: `ProjectSettings/McpUnitySettings.json`
- Timeout: 10 seconds default
- Remote: set `AllowRemoteConnections=true` + `UNITY_HOST=<ip>`

## MCP client config

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "mcp-unity": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/Packages/mcp-unity/Server~/build/index.js"]
    }
  }
}
```
